content: Apply DB migration (alter recipes: is_draft, draft_step + index) via SQL Editor
Update routes: add /my-recipes/new, /my-recipes/edit/:id (full-screen, no AppLayout), and /my-recipes/:id (placeholder ComingSoon)
Build REC-001 MyRecipesScreen: list, search, FAB, empty state, long-press delete with confirmation
Build REC-002 RecipeWizardScreen with persistent header (X + progress bar) + 5 steps + draft persistence
Build wizard Step 4 (ingredients) + AddRecipeIngredientModal (without location/basic, with is_key toggle, accepts quarantined ingredients)
Build wizard Step 5 (steps batch save) + final 'Guardar receta' with nutrition calc
Implement nutrition calculation utility (uses unit_conversions and per-100 values)
Resume mode: load existing recipe + ingredients + steps and jump to draft_step
Wire PostHog analytics events for recipes flow
Apply MOD-001 UX fix: visually mute cantidad+unidad when bsico is ON
